partial_progress.details: Iteration 5: Analyzed 13 sorry locations. Added M-reflexivity case splits at lines 860/865 and 921/923. When M is NOT reflexive, forward witnesses automatically don't see M back (proven via T4 propagation). Remaining sorries (13 total) are in cases where M IS reflexive - these require well-founded recursion with termination measure.

review_reason: 13 sorries remain in M-reflexive cases. Mathematical analysis shows these require well-founded recursion on a termination measure (subformula count or candidate formula cardinality). The W ~ M infinite iteration is mathematically consistent - impossibility approach does NOT work. Proof restructure needed.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 5: Implemented M-reflexivity case splits. Proved that when M is NOT reflexive, forward witnesses don't see M back (via T4). 13 sorries remain in M-reflexive cases requiring well-founded recursion.
